data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time-boxed seat holds while checkout is in progress', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the time-boxed hold mechanism. This indicates a clear gap in the validation process, as the necessary evidence to confirm this requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of time-boxed seat holds during checkout.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
